pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Leadership & Strategy falls outside the primary competency scope of the VP Data Engineering. This task KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Leadership & Strategy truly out-of-scope for the VP Data Engineering? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Leadership & Strategy as a core or recommended competency for the VP Data Engineering. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Leadership & Strategy falls outside the established competency profile for the VP Data Engineering. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Leadership & Strategy is outside the competency scope of the VP Data Engineering. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
